title: On Holding AG Delivers Record Results, Tempers Growth
text: On Holding AG announced strong 2023 full-year results with net sales reaching CHF 1.79 billion, growing 47% year-over-year and exceeding the company's expectations for the year, representing 55% growth on a constant currency basis. For Q4 2023 specifically, the company reached global consolidated net sales of CHF 447.1 million with 21.9% year-over-year growth. The company significantly increased gross profit margin from 56% to 59.6% and adjusted EBITDA margin from 13.5% to 15.5%. DTC channel grew 38.2% to CHF 206.6 million, with currency-neutral growth of 49%. Asia Pacific net sales reached CHF 126.5 million, up 70.8% reported and 85.1% at constant currency. However, growth moderation was expected in 2024 as the company matured and faced increasing competition.
